line: GROVE_RESULT
Implemented periodic process metrics collection in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:1`.
GROVE_ARTIFACTS
- Added `ProcessMonitor` with PID, `sysinfo::System`, and configurable poll interval in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:9`.
- Implemented async polling loop with 2s default interval in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:32`.
- Refreshes only the target process via `refresh_processes_specifics` in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:68`.
- Emits `AgentEvent::ProcessMetrics` with CPU, RSS, virtual memory, and disk IO counters in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:54`.
- Emits a dead-process metrics event when the process disappears in `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:44` and `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs:79`.
- Exported the monitor from `crates/saw-daemon/src/lib.rs:1`.
- Added daemon crate deps for `chrono`, `sysinfo`, and tokio time support in `crates/saw-daemon/Cargo.toml:6`.
GROVE_LESSONS
- `sysinfo` CPU usage is diff-based, so priming once before the loop and then sampling on the next interval gives stable rolling values.
- Using `interval_at(now + poll_interval, poll_interval)` avoids the immediate first tick and keeps cadence aligned with the requested interval.
GROVE_DECISIONS

- Represented process death as `AgentEvent::ProcessMetrics { process_alive: false, ... }` instead of introducing a new event variant, because `saw-core` already models liveness off `ProcessMetrics` in `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs:430`.
- Kept the emitter generic as `FnMut(AgentEvent)` so the monitor can plug into the existing event bus without coupling to a specific channel type.
GROVE_WARNINGS
- The acceptance criterion says “Dead event”, but the current shared event model has no `AgentEvent::Dead`; death is emitted as a `ProcessMetrics` event with `process_alive = false`.
- Memory verification test is Linux-specific because it compares against `/proc/<pid>/status`.
Checks:
- `cargo test -p saw-daemon process_monitor`
- `cargo test -p saw-daemon`
GROVE_EXIT: true
